name: a detector-less rule passes clean content through the native universal enforcer (a real verdict, not a skip)
command: printf '%s\n' 'rules:' '  - id: scraped-no-eval' '    description: "JavaScript code must never call eval() because it enables code injection"' '    severity: P0' '    mode: forbid' '    applies: "*.js"' '    token: "eval("' '    enforced_by: [{tool: semgrep}]' > x.yaml && printf 'const r = JSON.parse(userInput);\n' > ok.js && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/enforce-file.sh" --file ok.js --extra-rules x.yaml >/dev/null 2>e.txt; rc=$?; [ "$rc" -eq 0 ] && grep -q 'status=green' e.txt && echo clean-passes-natively 1>&2
